verses.latin_vulgate: Filiis Core. Psalmus cantici.   Fundamenta ejus in montibus sanctis ;
verses.douay_rheims: For the sons of Core, a psalm of a canticle. The foundations thereof are the holy mountains:
verses.finnish_biblia: Psalmi, Koran lasten veisu. Hän on vahvasti perustettu pyhäin vuorten päälle.
verses.king_james: His foundation is in the holy mountains.

verses.latin_vulgate: diligit Dominus portas Sion super omnia tabernacula Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹהֵ֣ב יְ֭הֹוָה שַׁעֲרֵ֣י צִיּ֑וֹן מִ֝כֹּ֗ל מִשְׁכְּנ֥וֹת יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord loveth the gates of Sion above all the tabernacles of Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra rakastaa Zionin portteja enempi kuin kaikkia Jakobin asuinsioja.
verses.king_james: The Lord loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gloriosa dicta sunt de te, civitas Dei !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִ֭כְבָּדוֹת מְדֻבָּ֣ר בָּ֑ךְ עִ֖יר הָאֱלֹהִ֣ים סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Glorious things are said of thee, O city of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Korkiat ja kunnialliset asiat sinussa saarnataan, sinä Jumalan kaupunki, Sela!
verses.king_james: Glorious things are spoken of thee, O city of God. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memor ero Rahab et Babylonis, scientium me ;  ecce alienigenæ, et Tyrus, et populus Æthiopum,  hi fuerunt illic.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַזְכִּ֤יר ׀ רַ֥הַב וּבָבֶ֗ל לְֽיֹ֫דְעָ֥י הִנֵּ֤ה פְלֶ֣שֶׁת וְצֹ֣ר עִם־כּ֑וּשׁ זֶ֝֗ה יֻלַּד־שָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will be mindful of Rahab and of Babylon knowing me. Behold the foreigners, and Tyre, and the people of the Ethiopians, these were there.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä annan saarnata Rahabin ja Babelin edessä, että he minun tuntevat: katso, Philistealaiset, Tyrolaiset ja Etiopialaiset syntyvät siellä.
verses.king_james: I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to them that know me: behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this man was born there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid Sion dicet : Homo et homo natus est in ea,  et ipse fundavit eam Altissimus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֥לְצִיּ֨וֹן ׀ יֵאָמַ֗ר אִ֣ישׁ וְ֭אִישׁ יֻלַּד־בָּ֑הּ וְה֖וּא יְכוֹנְנֶ֣הָ עֶלְיֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall not Sion say: This man and that man is born in her? and the Highest himself hath founded her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Zionille pitää sanottaman, että kaikkinaiset kansat siellä syntyvät, ja että Korkein sitä rakentaa.
verses.king_james: And of Zion it shall be said, This and that man was born in her: and the highest himself shall establish her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus narrabit in scripturis populorum et principum,  horum qui fuerunt in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה יִ֭סְפֹּר בִּכְת֣וֹב עַמִּ֑ים זֶ֖ה יֻלַּד־שָׁ֣ם סֶֽלָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord shall tell in his writings of peoples and of princes, of them that have been in her.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra antaa saarnata kirjoituksessa kaikkinaisilla kielillä, että myös muutamat heistä siellä syntyvät, Sela!
verses.king_james: The Lord shall count, when he writeth up the people, that this man was born there. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut lætantium omnium  habitatio est in te.
verses.douay_rheims: The dwelling in thee is as it were of all rejoicing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja veisaajat niinkuin tanssissa, kaikki minun lähteeni sinussa.
verses.king_james: As well the singers as the players on instruments shall be there: all my springs are in thee.
